title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 28 2021
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 28 2021
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report December 28 2021
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 28/12/2021
DCE iron ore futures market still fall trends. the main contract closed 673.5, an decrease of 3.37% throughout the day; the quotation inthe morning was decreased by 10 yuan/mt over yesterday. some traders were active to sell, Some steel mills still tend to be wait-and-see.so total transactions is poor.
